name: German Streusel Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald the milk; pour into a large mixing bowl and add sugar, 1/4 cup butter, and salt. Cool to lukewarm.
2. Dissolve yeast in 1/4 cup very warm water. Add yeast mixture and egg to milk mixture and stir well.
3. Gradually add 2 to 2-1/4 cups flour, beating after each addition. Cover and let rise until doubled in bulk (about 1 hour).
4. Spread batter evenly in a greased 13x9x2-inch pan.
5. Combine 1/2 cup flour, 1/2 cup sugar, and 1 tsp cinnamon. Cut in 1/4 cup butter with a fork or pastry blender.
6. Sprinkle the mixture over the batter in the pan. Let rise until doubled in bulk (30 to 45 minutes).
7. Bake at 375 degrees for 20 to 25 minutes.
